evals.prompt: Run the job search — check all three boards and show me what's new.
evals.expected_output: A ranked list of top 10 job positions fetched from Wellfound, web3.career, and jobstash.xyz. Each entry should have a score out of 100 with domain/role/stack/salary breakdown. The list should be sorted by score descending, filtered to remote-only positions, and presented in the defined format with a prompt asking which ones to pursue.
assertions: Output contains a ranked list of at least 5 job positions
Each position includes a score out of 100
Score breakdown is shown (domain + role + stack + salary components)
Output mentions at least one of the three job boards (wellfound, web3.career, jobstash.xyz)
Output ends with a prompt asking Ivan which positions to pursue
Web3/DeFi positions appear higher in the ranking than non-Web3 positions of similar seniority
No junior or entry-level roles are included in the results

evals.prompt: I just got referred to a role at a DeFi protocol called Ambient Finance — they're looking for a founding engineer, fully remote, TypeScript + React + smart contract integrations, no salary listed but well-funded Series A. Generate a lead file for it. The job posting is at https://jobs.lever.co/ambient-finance/founding-engineer
evals.expected_output: A complete lead file saved to leads/YYYY-MM-DD_ambient-finance_founding-engineer.md containing: frontmatter with all fields filled, match breakdown table, job description section, and a tailored 3-4 paragraph cover letter that references Ivan's specific metrics (e.g. $200M TVL, 100K DAU, $17M raised) and matches the DeFi/TypeScript/founding-engineer context. No hollow opener phrases.
assertions: A file is created in the leads/ directory
File name follows the YYYY-MM-DD_company_role slug pattern
Frontmatter contains status, company, role, source, score, domain fields
Match breakdown table is present with all four scoring categories
Cover letter section is present and is 3-4 paragraphs
Cover letter does NOT start with 'I am excited to apply' or similar filler phrases
Cover letter references at least one specific metric from Ivan's CV (TVL, DAU, SDK integrators, or funding)
Cover letter references TypeScript or React or Web3 stack in context of the role
Domain is set to 'web3' in frontmatter
Score is between 75-100 given the strong DeFi + founding engineer + TypeScript match

evals.prompt: Only check jobstash.xyz today — I want to see if there are any new founding engineer or tech lead roles in Web3 that pay at least $120k.
evals.expected_output: Results fetched specifically from jobstash.xyz (not the other boards), filtered to founding engineer or tech lead roles, filtered by $120k+ salary where listed. Positions scored and ranked. If fewer than 10 results meet criteria, show all qualifying ones. Header should note that only jobstash was scanned.
assertions: Output mentions jobstash.xyz as the source scanned
Output does NOT mention fetching from Wellfound or web3.career as sources for this run
Results are filtered to founding engineer and/or tech lead roles
Any listed salary below $120k is filtered out or explicitly noted as below threshold
Web3/DeFi positions rank higher than non-Web3 positions
Output ends with a prompt to select positions or notes no results were found
